articles.title: Laid-off Oracle workers tried to negotiate better severance. Oracle said no.  | TechCrunch
articles.description: Some found out they didn't qualify for WARN Act protections like two-months notice because the company had classified them as remote workers.
articles.content:
As was widely reported, Oracle axed an estimated 20,000 to 30,000 people via email on March 31.
